<!-- Pull Request Template for 3ds-Google-Maps -->

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Describe what problem this PR fixes or what feature it adds.

Fixes # (issue number) or Related to: 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.
- OS / environment used:
- Steps to reproduce:

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the contributing guidelines (`CONTRIBUTING.md`).
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines and passes the linter (if applicable).
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have added necessary documentation (if appropriate).
- [ ] I updated CHANGELOG.md if there are user-facing changes.

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Include screenshots or animated GIFs for UI/visual changes.

## Additional notes for the reviewer

Add any other context or screenshots about the pull request here (optional).
